title: Streaming JSON, CSV, Accessible HTML, and Remediation Workflows · Execution Trace: Deterministic Order
summary: Outputs lack version and provenance, CSV formulas stay active, maps randomize order, giant tables fail reflow, and findings have no correction lifecycle. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go deterministic order increment in deterministic accessible report suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed…
objectives: Sort every externally visible map-derived set by stable typed keys and separate semantic order from serialization order.
Define headers, ordering, delimiter, quoting, newline, Unicode, nulls, formula defense, row limits, and round-trip tests with encoding/csv.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
